prompt: Create a dramatic anime-style split-screen confrontation illustration. The canvas is a wide 3:2 cinematic frame, divided by one glowing diagonal slash of pale pink-white light running from near the lower center to the upper right, separating two opposing scenes. On the left side, show a white-haired elf-like female knight lunging forward through the air in a dynamic foreshortened pose, face obscured by a soft square blur, with long flowing silver-white hair, pointed ears, ornate white and gold plate armor, dark underlayers, and a deep navy cape billowing behind her. She grips one oversized fantasy sword with both hands, thrusting it toward the viewer; the sword has a broad translucent glowing blade with blue-white energy, sparkling particles, and metallic gold detailing on the hilt. Surround her with many floating asteroid fragments of varying sizes in a stormy sky, emphasizing motion and impact. On the right side, show a dark-haired woman in a black tailored suit standing confidently on the edge of a large black futuristic aircraft or spaceship hull, face also obscured by a soft square blur, one hand in her pocket and the other relaxed at her side, legs apart in a dominant stance. The spaceship surface should be angular, matte black, industrial, and highly detailed with panels, vents, circular mechanisms, and underside machinery visible. The background on both sides is a moody blue-gray sky with scattered clouds, backlit sunlight, and a cinematic high-contrast atmosphere. Use an AI-anime illustration look with polished digital painting, detailed armor highlights, dramatic lighting, depth of field, motion blur, and epic fantasy-versus-sci-fi mood. Visible count: 2 main characters, 1 glowing diagonal divider, 1 giant glowing sword, 1 large spaceship platform, and numerous floating rock fragments; do not add text, logos, captions, borders, or extra characters.
